checks.name: Direct closure evidence
checks.summary: Closure references direct installed files and reports.

claim_boundary: This record covers only the installed skill entrypoint, local SkillGuard records, and current files inspected for this target. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
decision_reason: Installed skill contract-layer closure is bounded to direct local entrypoint, contract, and report files.
residual_risk: This static record must be refreshed when the skill entrypoint, route contract, or validation rules change.
